_doc: Data-driven reach-for table for Ramen Bones Analytics. Consumed by .claude/hooks/next-step-hint.js. Adding a new tool = appending one entry. after_step values: 1=discuss, 2=plan, 3=execute, 4=qa, 5=ship; null=any; 0=replaces full sequence (trivial path). Stack: SvelteKit + Cloudflare Pages + Supabase + Postgres RLS, solo-dev.

rows.note: new mobile UI surface, no existing component to copy
after design picked, before plan step
phase touches Supabase RLS, auth, secrets, or SQL with user input — Postgres RLS is the trust boundary
DB schema change — schema integrity is critical for cohort/LTV correctness
pre-landing diff review (SQL safety, RLS, trust boundaries)
bug appeared mid-build, root cause unclear
doc-only / comment edit / variable rename — replaces full sequence

rows.command: manual: validate against historical cohort numbers before deploy
rows.note: any change to cohort/LTV/KPI math must be checked against the v1 frozen baseline
verify SvelteKit/Supabase/Cloudflare API behavior before coding
